name: digital-stoic-marketplace
description: Cognitive development plugins for Claude Code. Live experiments in AI collaboration.

plugins.name: dstoic
plugins.description: Core infrastructure: git commits, model selection, hooks, scratch pad, kaizen, devil-advocate agent, and context save/load

plugins.name: openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec workflow management: init, plan, design, develop, review, test, sync, reflect, replan

plugins.name: retrospect
plugins.description: Retrospective analysis: session reports, collaborative retrospectives, and domain retrospectives

plugins.name: cognitive
plugins.description: Cynefin-routed problem-solving: frame, troubleshoot, investigate, brainstorm, probe, experiment, challenge, benchmark

plugins.name: convert
plugins.description: Document format conversion: PDF, EPUB, DOCX, PPTX to markdown, and markdown to PDF

plugins.name: toolsmith
plugins.description: Plugin and skill authoring: create/edit skills, agents, plugins, CLAUDE.md files, search skills, manage dependencies

plugins.name: content
plugins.description: Content transformation and writing: anonymization, infographics, literary rewriting, bridge captures, expense tracking

plugins.name: experimental
plugins.description: Experimental and utility skills: deployment, background tasks, pinning, summarization, skill testing, distillation, and context bootstrapping

plugins.name: gtd
plugins.description: GTD workflow automation for Obsidian vaults: capture, triage, route, focus

plugins.name: coach
plugins.description: Personal coaching with CLEAR protocol, anxiety-first surfacing, and Goldsmith accountability loop

plugins.name: biz
plugins.description: Business analysis toolkit: competitive analysis, UX strategy, UX wireframes, UX evaluation, UX polish, market sizing, canvas, PRD, personas

plugins.name: philosopher
plugins.description: Philosopher personas: historically-grounded dialogue with source attribution, period awareness, and AI meta-cognition

plugins.name: cowork
plugins.description: Multi-project context management: switch projects, save/load sessions, ref/wip file zones + sync. Designed for non-CLI interfaces (Cowork desktop, Telegram).

plugins.name: lazy
plugins.description: Lazy skill demand capture: declare placeholder skills that intercept trigger keywords and log hits to measure real demand before building the full implementation. Toggle off to pause capture.
